modules.name: Module 1: JVM Architecture & Core Execution Mechanics

topics.title: javac Compiler vs Execution Flow
subtopics: Source code compilation steps and bytecode format (.class files)
JVM execution engine components (Interpreter and JIT Compiler)
JIT compiler profiling and HotSpot optimizations (c1/c2 compilers)
Bytecode Verifier security rules (buffer overflow prevention)

topics.title: JVM Memory Architecture
subtopics: Heap memory blocks (Eden, Survivor spaces, Tenured generation)
Stack frames push/pop execution paths (local variables table, operand stack)
Method Area to Metaspace native OS memory migration in Java 8+
PC Registers, Native Method Stacks, and thread private vs shared spaces

topics.title: String Constant Pool (SCP)
subtopics: SCP Heap memory allocations and literal caching mechanics
String Immutability reasoning, security (hash keys), and thread-safety
String intern() method caching traps and heap allocations
StringBuilder concatenation in loops and compiler optimizations

topics.title: Variables & Scope
subtopics: Primitive vs Reference types stack-heap mappings
Implicit/explicit narrowing casting and promotion rules
Precision loss rules in floating-point assignments

topics.title: Operators & Control Flow
subtopics: Label break and continue control shifts in nested loops
Bitwise operators logic and masking
Ternary evaluation precedence and auto-unboxing traps

modules.name: Module 2: Advanced OOP, Generics & Collections Internals

topics.title: Constructors & Initializers
subtopics: Constructor Chaining via super() and this() call sequences
Static vs Instance initializer blocks execution order rules
final keyword compiler optimization and thread-safety implications

topics.title: Access Modifiers & Encapsulation
subtopics: Private/protected package boundaries and access levels
Designing strictly immutable classes (defensive copying of mutables)
Accessor/mutator invariant validations

topics.title: Polymorphism
subtopics: Method Overloading vs Overriding resolution precedence
Dynamic method dispatch execution under method overrides
Static vs dynamic binding compiler steps and virtual tables

topics.title: Generics
subtopics: Type safety and generics compilation (checked vs unchecked casting)
Bounded wildcards (? extends T vs ? super T PECS rule)
Type Erasure boundaries and runtime checks limitations

topics.title: Collections Internals
subtopics: ArrayList resizing amortized cost and structural arrays
HashMap collision treeification (Red-Black Trees threshold limits)
ConcurrentHashMap lock striping, volatile buckets, and CAS updates

modules.name: Module 3: Exception Handling, I/O & Custom Serialization

topics.title: Throwable Hierarchy
subtopics: Throwable, Error, Exception classifications
Checked vs unchecked exceptions compiler checks and designs
Exception propagation rules through call stacks

topics.title: Exception Control Flow
subtopics: try-catch-finally control flow return value traps
Exception masking and suppression in nested catch blocks
Custom exceptions design and serializability

topics.title: Try-with-resources
subtopics: AutoCloseable interface requirements and close() signatures
Compiler-generated close() calls and nested try catches
Resource leaks prevention (sockets, database connections)

topics.title: Java I/O Streams
subtopics: Byte streams vs Character streams (Reader/Writer layouts)
Buffered streams performance optimizations and flush rules
NIO File Channels and non-blocking file read boundaries

topics.title: Serialization
subtopics: Serializable interface constraints and transient fields
serialVersionUID verification and custom hooks (writeObject, readObject)
Preventing serialization bypass and singleton vulnerabilities

modules.name: Module 4: Functional Programming & Streams API Pipeline

topics.title: Lambda Expressions
subtopics: Lambda syntax and functional interfaces compiler targets
Lexical scoping closures and capturing effectively final local variables
Scope rules and serialization of lambdas

topics.title: Functional Interfaces
subtopics: @FunctionalInterface annotation validations
Predicate, Consumer, Supplier, Function, and BiFunction implementations
Primitive variants (IntConsumer, ToDoubleFunction) memory benefits

topics.title: Method References
subtopics: ClassName::methodName syntax classifications
Instance methods binding and constructor references
Type inference in method references arguments matching

topics.title: Streams API Intermediate
subtopics: Pipeline lazy evaluation and short-circuiting intermediate steps
filter, map, flatMap mapping transformations
sorted, distinct stateful operations complexity bounds

topics.title: Streams API Terminal
subtopics: collect, reduce, forEach, count terminal execution triggers
Optional anti-patterns (avoiding get() without checks)
LocalDate/Time thread-safety updates (JSR-310 API vs Date)

modules.name: Module 5: Concurrency, Thread Synchronization & Advanced JVM

topics.title: Concurrency
subtopics: Process vs Thread resources allocation, thread stacks
Thread lifecycle states transitions (New, Runnable, Blocked, Waiting)
Runnable vs Callable vs Future interfaces and Executing pools

topics.title: Java Memory Model (JMM)
subtopics: Happens-Before relationship rules and cache coherence
Memory visibility, instruction reordering, and volatile memory barriers
Atomic operations vs thread scheduling

topics.title: Synchronization & Locks
subtopics: Synchronized monitors, lock flags, and reentrant execution
ReentrantLock, ReadWriteLock, and condition variables
Deadlocks prevention, detection, and lock-free atomic structures (CAS)

topics.title: JVM Class Loading Lifecycle
subtopics: Load, Link (verify, prepare, resolve), and Initialize stages
ClassLoader hierarchy delegation model (Bootstrap, Extension, Application)
Custom ClassLoaders creation and dependency isolation overrides

topics.title: Garbage Collection
subtopics: Minor vs Major vs Full GC definitions and pause triggers
G1GC regional marking phases and young/old generation splits
ZGC colored pointers, load barriers, and low-latency concurrent pauses
